ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "year_completed" INTEGER /* Year the property was completed */,
  "ad_selling_price" TEXT /* Range of selling prices (e.g., RM382,000 - RM880,000) */,
  "ad_rental_price" TEXT /* Range of rental prices (e.g., RM620 - RM620) */,
  "avg_rental_yield" REAL /* Average rental yield as a percentage (e.g., 3.09%) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location (e.g., city, neighborhood) of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, commercial) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "area_sqm" REAL /* Area of the property in square meters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the property details were last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., available, sold, rented) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_ranges" (
  "price_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price range */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the price range belongs to */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of price (e.g., selling, rental) */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price in the range */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price in the range */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the price (e.g., RM, RM psf) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the price range was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price information (e.g., market data, user input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_ranges_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the transaction is for */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the transaction */,
  "tenant_buyer" TEXT /* Name of the tenant or buyer */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, rental) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental (in months) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the rental contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the rental contract */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, bank transfer) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, agent, investor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
